hero.heading: Scan & fix broken translations in any repo
hero.description: Paste a public GitHub repo URL and instantly get a localization health report, missing keys, untranslated strings, and coverage per locale-then fix everything in one click.
hero.hint: Works with any public repo-supports JSON, YAML, and .po locale files

paste.title: Paste a repo URL
paste.description: Enter any public GitHub repo. We auto-detect locale files in common patterns like locales/, i18n/, public/locales/.

report.title: Get a health report
report.description: See per-locale coverage, missing keys, untranslated strings, and orphan keys-all in a visual dashboard.

fix.title: Fix with one click
fix.description: Lingo.dev translates all missing strings instantly. Download the fixed files or open a PR directly.

dashboard.title: Your Reports
dashboard.empty: No reports yet. Scan a repo to get started.

newScan.title: New Scan
newScan.description: Paste a public GitHub repo URL to scan for translation issues.
newScan.hint: Supports JSON, YAML, and .po locale files

recentScans.title: Recent Scans
recentScans.description: See how popular open-source projects score on i18n health

notFound.heading: Are you lost?
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist. Let's get you back to scanning repos.
